assertion_results.text: Output must score at least three areas at 4/5 or higher
assertion_results.evidence: Six areas at 4/5 or higher: Test Coverage & Strategy 4/5, CI/CD Pipeline 4/5, Deployment Safety 5/5, Incident Management 5/5, Observability 5/5, Testing Culture 4/5.

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend tooling the team already has (e.g. Datadog, feature flags, SLOs)
assertion_results.evidence: No recommendation to adopt Datadog, feature flags, or SLOs. New tooling recommended: Stryker (mutation testing), Lighthouse CI/bundle size tracking, supabase test db, Pact (contract testing). Datadog referenced only as existing context ('does this feature have a Datadog SLO?'), not as a new recommendation.

assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one non-trivial medium- or long-term recommendation
assertion_results.evidence: Priority 1.2: 'Formalize an architectural decision record (ADR) process.' Priority 2.1: 'Introduce mutation testing (Stryker).' These are substantive, non-trivial recommendations.

assertion_results.text: Output must acknowledge the low incident rate of 0.1 P1/month
assertion_results.evidence: Incident Management scored 5/5: '0.1 P1/month and 12-min MTTR at this scale is outstanding.' Executive summary: 'incident rate, MTTR, deploy frequency, and CI discipline — are elite-tier.'

assertion_results.text: Output must include at least one improvement item
assertion_results.evidence: Multiple improvement items: CODEOWNERS 2-approval, ADR process, Supabase contract testing, mutation testing, Lighthouse CI, per-module coverage thresholds.
